description: CRO: A/B testing, landing page optimization, funnel analysis. 1% conversion improvement = 10% revenue sube (si traffic plano).

items.principle: Landing page efectiva: 1 value prop, 1 CTA, <5s load, mobile optimized. Típicamente 2-5% conversion si bien diseñado.
items.tactic: Estructura: Headline (valor en 5s) → Subheadline (prove it) → Visual (foto/video) → Benefits (3 bullet points) → CTA (botón grande, contraste alto). Social proof (reviews, testimonios) antes de CTA. Eliminar navegación (distrae). Test: headline 1, visual 1, CTA copy 1.
examples: SaaS: 'Save 10 hours/week' (headline) → '500+ companies trust us' (social proof) → Video (1min) → 'Start free trial' (button)
E-commerce: 'Free shipping on orders >$50' → '4.8/5 stars (1200 reviews)' → Product photos → 'Add to cart'

items.principle: No hipótesis = no learning. Test 1 variable por vez (headline, button color, CTA copy). Resultado: winner → deploy, loser → iterate.
items.tactic: Poder estadístico: mín 100 conversiones por variante (n=200 total). Test duration: 2 semanas o 1000 visitors (lo que sea mayor). Winner: p-value <0.05 (95% confident).
items.framework: Hypothesis → Test (2 variantes, n=200) → Analyze (p<0.05?) → Deploy winner → Repeat
examples: H: Headline 'Save time' → conversión vs 'Stop wasting money' → conversión. Test 2 semanas: 'Save time' wins 5% vs 3%. Deploy.
H: Button 'Buy now' vs 'Get started'. Test: 'Get started' +2% conversion. Deploy, savings $2k/month (1000 clicks, 1% = 10 extra sales).

items.principle: Conversion funnel: Landing → Page 2 → Checkout → Complete. Si leak en etapa X, no vale traffic más abajo. Optimize cada etapa.
items.tactic: Medir: Landing (100%) → Page 2 (70%) → Checkout (30%) → Complete (10%). Bottleneck: Checkout solo 43% (100/100 a checkout, 43 completan). Tactic: Reduce fields, one-click pay, reduce friction.
items.framework: Visualizar funnel → Identifica bottleneck (peor % drop) → Optimiza esa etapa → Remeasure
examples: E-commerce funnel: Landing 1000 → PDP 750 → Cart 300 → Checkout 90 → Complete 45. Bottleneck: Cart → Checkout (30%). Solución: reduce cart complexity.
SaaS funnel: Landing 1000 → Signup 500 → Trial 200 → Subscribe 30. Bottleneck: Trial → Subscribe (15%). Solución: improve onboarding (aha moment en día 1).
